# limx-robotics-mcp

FastMCP 3.2 wrapper for LimX Dynamics open-source robotics stack.

## Tools

- start_sim — Launch TRON 1 or Oli MuJoCo simulation (background process)
- stop_sim — Terminate a running simulation
- sim_jobs — List/status simulation jobs with log tail
- list_robot_variants — Discover valid ROBOT_TYPE values
- get_robot_description — Load URDF/USD/XML model files
- sim_status — Health check (repos, submodules, SDK, Python deps)

## Setup

```powershell
git submodule update --init --recursive  # in tron1-mujoco-sim and humanoid-mujoco-sim
.\setup-sim-env.ps1                      # creates .venv-sim38 (Python 3.8 + mujoco + limxsdk)
uv run python -m limx_robotics_mcp       # start MCP server
```

## External repos

Cloned under D:\Dev\repos\external/:
- tron1-mujoco-sim — TRON 1 biped MuJoCo sim
- humanoid-mujoco-sim — Oli humanoid MuJoCo sim
- humanoid-description — URDF/USD/XML robot models
- limxsdk-lowlevel — C++11/Python low-level SDK

## Docs

- docs/SIM_SETUP.md — full MuJoCo setup guide, known limitations, troubleshooting
